mapper.select:
SELECT cour.course_id as course_id , cour.title as title , u.name as inst_name , substr(cour.start_date,1,10) as start_date , substr(cour.end_date,1,10) as end_date , period_diff(LEFT(REPLACE(cour.end_date, '-',''),6),LEFT(REPLACE(cour.start_date, '-',''),6)) as period_cnt , IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt, 0) as stu_cnt , cla.people_limit as people_limit , CASE WHEN cour.start_date > CURDATE() THEN 0 ELSE round((IFNULL(cour_att.출석횟수, 0) / (GREATEST(DATEDIFF(IF(cour.end_date < CURDATE(), cour.end_date, CURDATE()), cour.start_date), 1) * IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt, 1))) * 100, 2) END as att_ratio , cla.class_name as class_name , cour.time_code as time_code , cour.sub_prof as sub_prof , cour.class_id as class_id , sub.name as subInstName , cour.cos_sta_code FROM course cour LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON cour.professor = u.loginID LEFT JOIN course_class cla ON cour.class_id = cla.class_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, count(1) as stu_cnt FROM student_course WHERE stu_cou_sta_code = 0 GROUP BY course_id ) stu_cour ON stu_cour.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 출석횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 1 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY course_id ) cour_att ON cour_att.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo sub ON cour.sub_prof = sub.loginID
cour.course_isDeleted = 0
AND cour.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
GROUP BY cour.course_id ORDER BY cour.start_date DESC, cour.course_id DESC LIMIT #{pageIndex}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course cour
cour.course_isDeleted = 0
AND cour.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')

SELECT cour.course_id as course_id , cour.title as title , cour.content as content , cour.plan as plan , cour.notice as notice , u.name as inst_name , sub.name as subInstName , cour.sub_prof as sub_prof , cla.class_name as class_name , cour.class_id as class_id , cour.time_code as time_code , tim.start_time as start_time , tim.end_time as end_time , substr(cour.start_date,1,10) as start_date , substr(cour.end_date,1,10) as end_date , period_diff(LEFT(REPLACE(cour.end_date, '-',''),6),LEFT(REPLACE(cour.start_date, '-',''),6)) as period_cnt , IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt, 0) as stu_cnt , cla.people_limit as people_limit , round( (IFNULL(cour_att.출석횟수, 0) / (GREATEST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), cour.start_date), 1) * IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt, 1))) * 100 , 2) as att_ratio , round((IFNULL(cour_att_per.지각횟수,0)/(22*IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt,1))),2) as per_ratio , round((IFNULL(cour_att_abs.결석횟수,0)/(22*IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt,1))),2) as abs_ratio , cour_cnt.강의횟수 as cour_cnt FROM course cour LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON cour.professor = u.loginID LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo sub ON cour.sub_prof = sub.loginID LEFT JOIN course_class cla ON cour.class_id = cla.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time tim ON cour.time_code = tim.time_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, count(1) as stu_cnt FROM student_course WHERE stu_cou_sta_code = 0 GROUP BY course_id ) stu_cour ON stu_cour.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 출석횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 1 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY course_id ) cour_att ON cour_att.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 지각횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 2 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY course_id ) cour_att_per ON cour_att_per.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 결석횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 0 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY course_id ) cour_att_abs ON cour_att_abs.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, count(distinct substr(date,1,10)) as 강의횟수 FROM course_attendance GROUP BY course_id ) cour_cnt ON cour_cnt.course_id = cour.course_id WHERE cour.course_id = #{courseId} AND (cour.professor = #{loginID} OR cour.sub_prof = #{loginID}) AND cour.course_isDeleted = 0 GROUP BY cour.course_id

SELECT cour.course_id as course_id , cour.title as title , cour.content as content , cour.plan as plan , cour.notice as notice , u.name as inst_name , sub.name as subInstName , cour.sub_prof as sub_prof , cla.class_name as class_name , cour.class_id as class_id , cour.time_code as time_code , tim.start_time as start_time , tim.end_time as end_time , substr(cour.start_date,1,10) as start_date , substr(cour.end_date,1,10) as end_date , period_diff(LEFT(REPLACE(cour.end_date, '-',''),6),LEFT(REPLACE(cour.start_date, '-',''),6)) as period_cnt , IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt, 0) as stu_cnt , cla.people_limit as people_limit , round( (IFNULL(cour_att.출석횟수, 0) / (GREATEST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), cour.start_date), 1) * IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt, 1))) * 100 , 2) as att_ratio , round((IFNULL(cour_att_per.지각횟수,0)/(22*IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt,1))),2) as per_ratio , round((IFNULL(cour_att_abs.결석횟수,0)/(22*IFNULL(stu_cour.stu_cnt,1))),2) as abs_ratio , cour_cnt.강의횟수 as cour_cnt FROM course cour LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON cour.professor = u.loginID LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo sub ON cour.sub_prof = sub.loginID LEFT JOIN course_class cla ON cour.class_id = cla.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time tim ON cour.time_code = tim.time_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, count(1) as stu_cnt FROM student_course WHERE stu_cou_sta_code = 0 GROUP BY course_id ) stu_cour ON stu_cour.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 출석횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 1 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY course_id ) cour_att ON cour_att.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 지각횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 2 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY course_id ) cour_att_per ON cour_att_per.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 결석횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 0 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY course_id ) cour_att_abs ON cour_att_abs.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, count(distinct substr(date,1,10)) as 강의횟수 FROM course_attendance GROUP BY course_id ) cour_cnt ON cour_cnt.course_id = cour.course_id WHERE cour.course_id = #{courseId} AND cour.course_isDeleted = 0 GROUP BY cour.course_id

SELECT cour.course_id , cour.title , cla.class_name , cour.class_id , cour.time_code , substr(cour.start_date, 1, 10) AS start_date , substr(cour.end_date, 1, 10) AS end_date FROM course cour LEFT JOIN course_class cla ON cour.class_id = cla.class_id WHERE cour.course_isDeleted = 0 AND cour.start_date <= #{weekEnd} AND cour.end_date >= #{weekStart} ORDER BY cla.class_name, cour.time_code

SELECT cour.course_id as course_id , cour.title as title , u.name as inst_name , substr(cour.start_date,1,10) as start_date , substr(cour.end_date,1,10) as end_date , period_diff(LEFT(REPLACE(cour.end_date, '-',''),6),LEFT(REPLACE(cour.start_date, '-',''),6)) as period_cnt , stu_cour.stu_cnt as stu_cnt , cla.people_limit as people_limit , round((cour_att.출석횟수/(22*stu_cour.stu_cnt)) * 100,2) as att_ratio FROM course cour LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON cour.professor = u.loginID LEFT JOIN course_class cla ON cour.class_id = cla.class_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, count(1) as stu_cnt, stu_cou_sta_code FROM student_course WHERE stu_cou_sta_code = 0 GROUP BY 1, 3 ) stu_cour ON stu_cour.course_id = cour.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) as 출석횟수, course_id FROM course_attendance WHERE att_sta_code = 1 AND DAYOFWEEK(date) BETWEEN 2 AND 6 GROUP BY 2 ) cour_att ON cour_att.course_id = stu_cour.course_id
(cour.professor = #{loginID} OR cour.sub_prof = #{loginID}) AND cour.course_isDeleted = 0
and cour.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
and u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND 1=2
and start_date >= #{search_sdate} and end_date < #{search_edate}
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7 ORDER BY start_date desc LIMIT #{pageIndex}, #{pageSize}
SELECT class_id , class_name , people_limit FROM course_class ORDER BY class_name ASC
SELECT time_code , start_time , end_time FROM course_time ORDER BY time_code ASC
SELECT loginID , name , user_type FROM tb_userinfo WHERE user_type = 'I' ORDER BY name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course ( title, professor, sub_prof, class_id, time_code, start_date, end_date, content, plan, notice, cos_sta_code, course_isDeleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{loginID}, NULLIF(#{sub_prof}, ''), #{class_id}, #{time_code}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{content}, #{plan}, #{notice}, #{cos_sta_code}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET title = #{title}, sub_prof = NULLIF(#{sub_prof}, ''), class_id = #{class_id}, time_code = #{time_code}, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, content = #{content}, plan = #{plan}, notice = #{notice} WHERE course_id = #{course_id} AND (professor = #{loginID} OR sub_prof = #{loginID}) AND course_isDeleted = 0
UPDATE course SET course_isDeleted = 1 WHERE course_id = #{course_id} AND (professor = #{loginID} OR sub_prof = #{loginID}) AND course_isDeleted = 0
